description_long: This is a worn, two-seater sofa with a distressed brown fabric exterior, showing significant signs of age and use. The seat and back cushions are visibly sagging and uneven, with several areas patched with strips of gray duct tape, indicating makeshift repairs. The armrests are broad and rounded, matching the overall bulky and overstuffed appearance of the sofa. The upholstery is heavily stained and faded, especially on the seat and back surfaces, with some areas showing more pronounced discoloration. The back of the sofa is plain and also displays wear, with no visible decorative elements or legs. This sofa would likely be found abandoned or used in an outdoor urban environment, such as a sidewalk, alley, or garage.
description: A heavily worn, brown two-seater sofa with sagging cushions, duct tape repairs, and visible stains. The armrests are rounded and the upholstery is faded and distressed.
description_view_0: Front view showing two sagging seat cushions, two back cushions, rounded armrests, and multiple duct tape patches.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the seat, the rounded armrest, and visible wear on the side and top surfaces.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, stained back panel with no visible legs or decorative features.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the armrest, sagging cushions, and additional duct tape repairs on the side.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, sagging seat cushions and two matching back cushions, all attached and uniform in size, with no visible separation or tufting.
attribute_armrest_style: Both armrests are present, broad, and rounded, extending slightly above the seat height with a fully padded, overstuffed profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Legs are not visible; the sofa base appears to rest directly on the ground, suggesting hidden or recessed support.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight backrest with two attached, sagging cushions, continuous across the width, and no tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid brown fabric with a distressed, stained, and faded appearance; no visible pattern, but several areas are patched with gray duct tape.
